title: Clinical Laboratory Technician
description: We're hiring a Clinical Laboratory Technician at CDC. This is an exciting opportunity to join our public service, scientific rigor, emergency-ready team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Government/Public Health, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Perform clinical laboratory tests on patient specimens following established protocols
Operate and maintain laboratory instrumentation and quality control systems
Collect and process patient specimens ensuring proper handling and documentation
Review results and escalate critical values to clinical staff immediately
Maintain accurate and timely laboratory information system records
Participate in quality assurance programs and continuing education

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Clinical Laboratory Science
certifications: Medical Lab Technician (MLT) or Medical Technologist (MT) ASCP
